description: Expected results for reachability state testing across all signal types

unknown.notes: CVEs should always have determined reachability based on import analysis

test_only.notes: CWEs in test files should be marked as test_only or excluded

unknown.notes: Secrets in .env files cannot have reachability determined

reachable.notes: CONFIG issues never have reachable state - they are deployment-time

not_reachable.notes: CONFIG issues never have not_reachable state

unknown.notes: CONFIG issues always have unknown/N/A reachability

MALWARE.notes: No malware packages included in this test suite - see malware-test-packages/ for malware testing

validation_rules.description: CVEs from imported packages should be REACHABLE, from unimported should be NOT_REACHABLE
CWEs in dead code (unimported modules) should be NOT_REACHABLE
Secrets in .env files should have UNKNOWN reachability
CONFIG issues should always have UNKNOWN/N/A reachability
CWEs in test files should be marked differently or excluded
validation_rules.check: cwe.test_only.count >= 0 OR tests/ excluded from scan
